name: Post-Match Scenario
description: Events that occur after a match concludes

entries.templateText: FAVORED extends a hand to UNDERDOG after the bell — UNDERDOG hesitates, then accepts. The crowd gives a standing ovation.
FAVORED grabs a chair and drives it into UNDERDOG's spine three times after the bell, standing over them as the crowd rains down boos.
FAVORED stands center ring, raising the hand of UNDERDOG in a profound display of mutual respect that unites the entire arena.
UNDERDOG offers a handshake, but FAVORED simply looks down, nods with quiet respect, and exits the ring to allow UNDERDOG the spotlight.
FAVORED and UNDERDOG share an emotional embrace in the center of the ring, putting an end to months of bitter animosity.
FAVORED raises a hand in victory, but UNDERDOG pulls them down into a desperate, tearful hug of appreciation.
FAVORED helps a battered UNDERDOG to their feet, raising their arm to ensure the crowd rewards the incredible effort.
FAVORED bows to UNDERDOG before leaving the ring, a striking cultural sign of respect that leaves the fans cheering wildly.
FAVORED refuses to break their submission hold after the bell, forcing three referees to physically tear them away from a screaming UNDERDOG.
FAVORED mounts a completely helpless UNDERDOG after the match, raining down a barrage of vicious, uninhibited closed-fist strikes.
FAVORED traps the neck of UNDERDOG inside a steel chair and prepares to jump from the ropes before security swarms the ring.
FAVORED drags an unconscious UNDERDOG to the ringside floor, executing a brutal powerbomb directly onto the exposed concrete.
FAVORED uses a pair of medical scissors to cut away at the wrestling gear of UNDERDOG, completely humiliating them after the bell.
FAVORED locks UNDERDOG in a pair of handcuffs, leaving them completely defenseless against a slow, systematic post-match beatdown.
FAVORED takes a microphone and mocks the family of a broken UNDERDOG while actively stomping on their chest.
FAVORED celebrates their victory by grabbing a heavy championship belt and blasting UNDERDOG square in the skull with it.
As FAVORED stands over UNDERDOG, a thunderous new theme song plays and a dominant surprise challenger emerges on the ramp to lock eyes with FAVORED.
FAVORED is blindsided during their victory celebration by a returning top-tier superstar, blowing the roof completely off the building.
A mysterious masked figure climbs over the guardrail, wiping out both FAVORED and UNDERDOG before vanishing into the crowd.
FAVORED calls out the champion, but a surprise challenger sprints from the back to attack FAVORED, stealing their spotlight.
An international standout makes their presence known, walking down the aisle to hand a formal challenge document directly to FAVORED.
A massive faction leader stands on the stage, gesturing to the back as four heavy enforcers surround a victorious FAVORED.
The ring announcer declares that because of this victory, FAVORED has officially earned a guaranteed world championship match next week.
An official broadcast graphic confirms that the win by FAVORED shifts the championship landscape, forcing UNDERDOG out of the title picture completely.
FAVORED grabs the microphone and demands that management immediately authorize their championship match for the upcoming premium event.
The champion walks down the ramp, raises the gold high over a victorious FAVORED, and sets the stage for an epic collision.
FAVORED demands a microphone, warning the current titleholder that their historic reign is officially on borrowed time.
Management announces backstage that this devastating loss forces UNDERDOG to start at the absolute bottom of the divisional rankings.
FAVORED celebrates by offering a clean handshake to UNDERDOG, but suddenly delivers a brutal clothesline, executing a shocking heel turn.
FAVORED looks at their own tag team partner, contemplates for a long moment, and suddenly hits them with their finishing maneuver.
FAVORED goes to use a weapon on UNDERDOG after the bell, but stops, throws the weapon away, and embraces the cheers of the crowd.
FAVORED aggressively shoves their own manager to the canvas, completely severing ties to the delight of the live audience.
FAVORED walks up the ramp alone, completely ignoring the celebration antics of their villainous stablemates in a clear face tease.
FAVORED takes a fan's pro-face sign and rips it up after the bell, cementing a dark alignment shift that stuns the arena.
The manager of FAVORED enters the ring, presenting them with a heavy iron pipe to inflict further post-match damage on UNDERDOG.
The faction representing FAVORED floods the ring, lifting FAVORED onto their shoulders to celebrate a highly coordinated, dominant victory.
The manager of UNDERDOG slaps them across the face after the loss, abandoning them in the center of the ring to a chorus of boos.
The stable of FAVORED initiates a brutal four-on-one beatdown on UNDERDOG until lockers room faces rush out to clear the ring.
FAVORED is berated by their own stable leader for not finishing UNDERDOG fast enough, creating deep, visible cracks in the faction.
The manager of FAVORED handles the post-match interview, completely taking credit for the victory while a frustrated FAVORED looks on.
UNDERDOG sits center ring in complete, stunned silence for several minutes, staring at their hands as the weight of the loss sinks in.
UNDERDOG breaks down in visible tears on the ramp, completely overwhelmed by an emotional, heartbreaking defeat.
UNDERDOG completely snaps after the bell, destroying ringside equipment and tearing apart the commentary desk in a blind rage.
UNDERDOG gets a microphone and tells the crowd that if they cannot beat FAVORED, they may have to seriously consider retirement.
UNDERDOG slowly walks through the backstage curtain, completely refusing to answer any questions from waiting media reporters.
UNDERDOG demands that the referee restart the match, completely unable to accept the reality of the official pinfall decision.
UNDERDOG grabs a microphone before FAVORED can leave, demanding a rematch right here, right now, under no-disqualification rules.
FAVORED laughs off a frantic rematch demand from UNDERDOG, walking up the ramp while making a dismissive, insulting gesture.
UNDERDOG blocks the exit ramp, stating they will not leave the building until FAVORED signs a contract for a definitive rematch.
FAVORED agrees to a rematch, but only on the condition that UNDERDOG puts their actual wrestling career on the line.
UNDERDOG ambushes FAVORED during their post-match interview backstage, screaming that their business is far from finished.
FAVORED brutally cuts off a rematch plea by hitting UNDERDOG with a microphone, leaving them bleeding in the center of the ring.
The General Manager appears on the stage, ruling that because of the controversial finish, FAVORED must face UNDERDOG again next week.
The Authority Figure enters the ring to strip FAVORED of their win due to blatant post-match insubordination and violence.
The Commissioner announces that FAVORED is officially fined ten thousand dollars for an excessive post-match assault on UNDERDOG.
The General Manager sets an immediate, high-stakes Iron Man stipulation for the inevitable rematch between FAVORED and UNDERDOG.
An executive official bans the manager of FAVORED from the entire arena property following a chaotic post-match ringside incident.
The Authority Figure orders security to lock down the arena to prevent FAVORED from escaping a furious, vengeful UNDERDOG.
The live crowd completely hijacks the post-match segment, chanting the name of a completely different superstar to reject the win by FAVORED.
A massive wave of trash coordinates from the stands into the ring as FAVORED stands arrogantly over a completely broken UNDERDOG.
The entire stadium executes a massive, unified chant that perfectly echoes the signature catchphrase of a victorious FAVORED.
Fans jump the barricade to celebrate with FAVORED, creating an organic, chaotic scene that production struggles to control.
A massive, hostile arena chant targeting the performance of FAVORED completely ruins the intended post-match broadcast audio.
The arena crowd gives UNDERDOG a massive, emotional standing ovation as they limp up the ramp, completely validating the effort.
FAVORED celebrates by hoisting a giant customized flag center ring, completely igniting the hometown crowd into an absolute frenzy.
FAVORED attempts a post-match assault, but UNDERDOG completely counters, hitting their finisher to send the crowd home happy.
FAVORED pours a bottle of cheap beer over a defeated UNDERDOG, drawing a massive, visceral wave of nuclear heat from the crowd.
Medical personnel carry a completely motionless UNDERDOG out on a stretcher, leaving a somber, intensely serious atmosphere in the arena.
FAVORED climbs to the top turnbuckle, hoisting the championship gold high into the air as beautiful pyro explodes all around the ring.
FAVORED and UNDERDOG refuse to stop fighting after the bell, spilling out into the crowd and brawling all the way up into the arena concourse.
FAVORED forces the ring announcer at ringside to repeatedly declare them the absolute greatest competitor of all time.
FAVORED locks UNDERDOG in a brutal, post-match submission hold using a heavy steel chain wrapped tightly around their neck.
FAVORED approaches the commentary desk, grabs a headset, and cuts an incredibly intense, unscripted promo directly into the camera lens.
UNDERDOG uses a sudden, desperate low blow to completely neutralize a victorious FAVORED during their high-energy celebration.
FAVORED aggressively shoves a ringside photographer to the ground, showing an unstable, volatile temper after a narrow win.
FAVORED leaves the ring immediately after the bell, completely refusing to celebrate or acknowledge the massive cheers of the fans.
FAVORED invites a young fan from the front row into the ring to share in a highly memorable, heart-warming victory celebration.
FAVORED spits directly onto the face of a fallen UNDERDOG before walking away, a disgusting act that seals their toxic rivalry.
UNDERDOG attempts a desperate post-match handshake, but a cold, completely unblinking FAVORED turns around and walks away without a word.
FAVORED and UNDERDOG collapse completely from total exhaustion, lying flat on their backs side-by-side as the broadcast fades to black.
